description: High-confidence ingredient swap rules for dietary adaptation. Used for substitution plausibility scoring (kb_match_rate component).

replacement: finely chopped shiitake mushrooms + toasted walnuts
rules.rationale: Shiitake provides meaty chew and glutamate umami; walnuts add fat richness and crumble texture mimicking browned pork.
Lentils match the loose granular texture of ground beef; tofu provides protein density with umami from soy.
Jackfruit shreds like chicken and absorbs marinades; seitan has dense chew and high protein comparable to poultry.
Tofu is a versatile poultry substitute that absorbs spices and browns well; chickpeas provide protein with a hearty texture.
Seitan has meaty, fibrous texture and high protein; portobello mushrooms have substantial bite and deep umami flavor.

replacement: coconut bacon (coconut flakes + smoked paprika + tamari)
rules.rationale: Smoked tempeh replicates smoky, savory, crispy qualities of bacon; coconut bacon provides crunch and smokiness.
Smoked tofu provides saltiness and smoky depth; beets contribute color, sweetness, and earthy depth similar to cured pork.

replacement: spiced lentil patty (lentils + smoked paprika + fennel seeds)
rules.rationale: Plant-based sausages replicate seasoned, fatty profile; spiced lentils with fennel provide herby sausage aromatics.
Lentils with cumin and coriander replicate the earthy, spiced profile of lamb; jackfruit with harissa provides hearty, gamey notes.
Seitan and crumbled tofu replicate the lean, neutral protein base of turkey and absorb seasoning well.

replacement: extra-firm tofu (marinated in nori + soy + lemon)
rules.rationale: Tofu marinated with nori provides mild oceanic flavor and flakes similarly; banana blossom has fibrous texture matching flaked white fish.

replacement: marinated carrot ribbons (carrot + nori + smoked paprika + capers)
rules.rationale: Carrot ribbons marinated with nori and capers replicate color, mild brininess, and omega-fatty-acid richness; beet gravlax provides earthy sweetness and deep color.

replacement: king oyster mushroom, sliced into rounds
rules.rationale: King oyster mushroom rounds hold shape and have firm, slightly bouncy texture; hearts of palm provide neutral flavor and fibrous bite close to shrimp.
Jackfruit shredded with nori flakes replicates the flaky, briny quality of crab; hearts of palm have fibrous texture similar to crab strands.
Miso provides fermented umami depth; capers contribute brininess and pungency that anchovy brings. Nori adds oceanic mineral notes.

replacement: 1 tbsp soy sauce + 0.5 tsp lime juice + pinch sugar
rules.rationale: Soy sauce provides fermented savory depth; lime juice replicates the bright acidity and slight fishiness; sugar balances the flavor.
Mushroom soy sauce provides the dark color and fermented depth of oyster sauce; sugar compensates for mild sweetness oyster sauce contributes.
Vegetable stock provides liquid base and mild savory depth; miso adds umami richness to compensate for the complexity of meat stocks.
Kombu dashi replicates the oceanic umami and mineral depth of fish-based broths without any fish content.

replacement: vegan worcestershire (tamari + apple cider vinegar + molasses + cloves)
rules.rationale: Tamari with ACV and molasses approximates the sweet-tangy-fermented profile of Worcestershire without anchovy.
Agar-agar is a seaweed-derived gelling agent with comparable gelling strength to gelatin; sets firmer at lower concentrations.
Coconut oil provides similar fat content and high smoke point; vegan butter contributes emulsification and richness similar to animal fats.

replacement: miso paste + nori powder (1 tsp miso + pinch nori)
rules.rationale: Miso provides intense fermented umami; nori powder adds oceanic mineral depth to replicate the pungent profile of shrimp paste.
Vegan butter replicates emulsification and flavor; coconut oil is neutral for savory cooking; applesauce provides moisture in baked goods.

replacement: cashew cream (1 cup soaked cashews blended with 0.5 cup water)
rules.rationale: Full-fat coconut cream replicates fat content and richness; cashew cream is neutral-tasting and whips to similar consistency.
Oat milk has closest texture and neutral flavor to cow milk; soy milk has highest protein content and works best in savory applications.

replacement: cashew cream cheese (soaked cashews + lemon juice + apple cider vinegar)
rules.rationale: Cashew cream cheese replicates tangy, spreadable profile of cream cheese with similar fat content and texture.

replacement: nutritional yeast + cashew blend (3 tbsp nutritional yeast + 2 tbsp ground cashew)
rules.rationale: Nutritional yeast provides the umami, nutty, cheesy flavor compounds (B-vitamins); cashew adds fat and texture.
Cashew-based vegan cheeses replicate melting behavior and creamy flavor; tofu feta mimics crumbly texture and tangy salt of feta.
Coconut and soy yogurts replicate thick, tangy profile; coconut provides richness, soy provides protein.
Cashew sour cream replicates tanginess and richness; coconut cream with acid provides similar tartness and cooling quality.
Refined coconut oil has high smoke point and neutral flavor comparable to ghee for high-heat cooking.

replacement: oat milk + 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar (let stand 5 min)
rules.rationale: Plant milk curdled with acid replicates the tangy, slightly thick properties of buttermilk for baking reactions.
Rice flour is light and neutral for coating; almond flour adds moisture and fat for baked goods; GF blends use xanthan gum for structure.
Tamari is brewed without wheat and has nearly identical flavor to standard soy sauce; coconut aminos is naturally gluten-free with milder flavor.
Rice pasta and glass noodles are naturally gluten-free and hold sauces comparably; lentil pasta adds protein.
GF panko replicates crunch without wheat; ground almonds add nutty crunch and fat; rice cracker crumbs are light and crispy.
Corn tortillas are naturally gluten-free and replicate the pliable, neutral wrap; lettuce wraps are fresh and crisp.
Rice noodles provide similar slippery texture; shirataki are naturally gluten-free; glass noodles absorb broth similarly.

replacement: flax egg (1 tbsp ground flaxseed + 3 tbsp water, rested 5 min)
chia egg (1 tbsp chia seeds + 3 tbsp water)
rules.rationale: Flax and chia eggs provide binding from mucilage; work in baked goods where eggs bind and add moisture.

replacement: aquafaba (3 tbsp per egg white, whip for meringue-style applications)
rules.rationale: Aquafaba (liquid from canned chickpeas) whips to stiff peaks like egg whites and sets when baked.
Aquafaba-based vegan mayo replicates emulsified, creamy texture; avocado provides richness and fat for spreading applications.

replacement: oat flour (if gluten not a concern)
rules.rationale: Sunflower seed flour has similar fat content and fine texture to almond flour; oat flour is a reliable baking substitute.
Sunflower seed butter has near-identical consistency and fat profile; tahini provides richness with slightly more bitter note.
Pumpkin seeds provide similar crunch and slight earthiness; sunflower seeds have comparable fat content and neutral flavor.
Pumpkin seeds and sunflower seeds provide crunch without nut allergen risk; hemp hearts add protein and mild flavor.
Toasted pumpkin or sunflower seeds provide crunch and mild, nutty-adjacent flavor without tree nut allergens.

replacement: lemon juice + fresh herbs (parsley, thyme, chives)
rules.rationale: Acid from lemon brightens flavor similarly to salt; potassium chloride salt substitute reduces sodium while maintaining some salinity.
Low-sodium tamari reduces sodium by ~30% with minimal flavor change; coconut aminos are naturally low-sodium with mild sweetness.

replacement: white miso paste (lower sodium than red, small amount)
rules.rationale: Low-sodium miso retains fermented umami complexity with significantly reduced sodium content.
Rinsed sun-dried tomatoes provide briny, tangy punch with minimal sodium after rinsing; olives add similar piquancy when thoroughly rinsed.
Erythritol bakes similarly to sugar with minimal glycemic impact; monk fruit is highly sweet with zero calories.

replacement: pureed dates (small amount, higher fiber, less sweet impact per serving)
rules.rationale: Stevia-based honey alternatives provide sweetness without significant blood sugar impact; dates have fiber that moderates absorption.

replacement: erythritol + 0.5 tsp molasses (for color and depth)
rules.rationale: Erythritol with molasses replicates the caramel depth of brown sugar; coconut sugar has lower glycemic index than refined brown sugar.

replacement: monk fruit syrup + 0.25 tsp maple extract
rules.rationale: Sugar-free maple syrup uses natural or artificial sweeteners; monk fruit syrup with extract replicates flavor without glycemic impact.

replacement: low-sodium vegetable broth (for sauteing, as needed)
rules.rationale: Applesauce provides moisture and binding in baked goods at a fraction of the fat; broth deglazes and prevents sticking in savory cooking.
Evaporated skim milk thickens sauces similarly with minimal fat; Greek yogurt provides creaminess and protein for cold applications.
Light coconut milk significantly reduces fat while maintaining coconut flavor; evaporated milk with extract is lowest-fat option.
Low-fat Greek yogurt replicates creamy, tangy quality at a fraction of the fat; avocado has healthier unsaturated fats.

replacement: hearts of palm, cut into rounds
king oyster mushroom, sliced into rounds
rules.rationale: Hearts of palm have fibrous, firm texture close to cooked shrimp; king oyster mushroom rounds hold shape and have bouncy, seafood-adjacent texture.

replacement: mushroom soy sauce + pinch of sugar
rules.rationale: Mushroom soy sauce provides the dark color, fermented depth, and umami of oyster sauce without shellfish.
Shredded jackfruit with nori provides fibrous texture and subtle oceanic flavor; hearts of palm shred to crab-like strands.

replacement: extra-firm tofu marinated in soy + lemon + nori
rules.rationale: Swordfish has dense, meaty texture comparable to lobster; marinated tofu absorbs oceanic flavors for a plant-based alternative.

replacement: king oyster mushroom caps (scored and seared)
rules.rationale: King oyster mushroom caps sear to golden crust similar to scallops; firm tofu rounds hold shape and absorb brine marinade.
Mushrooms simmered in broth absorb liquid and provide meaty, briny-adjacent texture; sun-dried tomatoes in brine add briny, umami depth.

replacement: miso paste + nori powder (1 tsp miso + 0.5 tsp nori)
rules.rationale: Miso provides intense fermented savory depth; nori adds oceanic mineral quality to approximate the funk of shrimp paste.
